---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve 撰写一份报告帮助我们改进
title: "[BUG] ..."
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

1. Environment / 运行环境
- OS / 操作系统:     [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, iOS 17]
- Browser / 浏览器:     [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- Software Type / 软件类型:     [e.g. Extension / 扩展, Script / 脚本]
- Version / 版本号:     [e.g. v2.0.0]
- Script Manager / 脚本管理器:     [e.g. Tampermonkey, None / 无] *(If applicable / 适用时填写)*

2. Description / 问题描述
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
请清晰、简洁地描述该 Bug 是什么。

3. Steps to Reproduce / 复现步骤


4. Screenshots / 截图 (Optional / 可选)
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
如果有截图，请在此处添加，以便更直观地说明问题。
